name: Notebooks Deployment
description: Deploy or redeploy 4 Spark Notebooks with correct Lakehouse bindings for the 3-Lakehouse Medallion Architecture (BronzeLH, SilverLH, GoldLH). Each notebook receives META dependencies metadata for its default and known lakehouses.

tasks.name: Resolve Lakehouse IDs
tasks.description: Look up all 3 Lakehouse IDs (BronzeLH, SilverLH, GoldLH) from workspace items via Fabric REST API.

tasks.name: Deploy NB01 BronzeToSilver
tasks.description: Deploy HorizonBooks_01_BronzeToSilver notebook from 01_BronzeToSilver.py. Default Lakehouse: BronzeLH. Injects META dependencies block with all 3 lakehouses.

tasks.name: Deploy NB02 WebEnrichment
tasks.description: Deploy HorizonBooks_02_WebEnrichment notebook from 02_WebEnrichment.py. Default Lakehouse: SilverLH. Injects META dependencies block with all 3 lakehouses.

tasks.name: Deploy NB03 SilverToGold
tasks.description: Deploy HorizonBooks_03_SilverToGold notebook from 03_SilverToGold.py. Default Lakehouse: GoldLH. Injects META dependencies block with all 3 lakehouses.

tasks.name: Deploy NB04 Forecasting
tasks.description: Deploy HorizonBooks_04_Forecasting notebook from 04_Forecasting.py. Default Lakehouse: GoldLH. Injects META dependencies block with all 3 lakehouses.
